name: Snicker Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt caramels with 1/3 cup milk.
2. In a bowl, combine the cake mix with butter and 1/2 cup milk; stir until smooth.
3. Grease and flour a 13 x 9 inch pan.
4. Spread the batter mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 6 to 8 minutes, or until lightly browned.
6. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
7. Cover the cooled cake layer with caramels, chocolate chips, and chopped nuts (if using).
8. Sprinkle remaining cake mix on top.
9. Return to oven and bake an additional 10 minutes, or until set.
